name: Agnafar the Avatar of Destruction that will Burn the World
description:
An impossibly powerful dragon of nearly infinite power stands at the peak of the world, ready to destroy it. Heroes lie dead or dying, bodies burnt to ash... but what about you? What will your fate be?

After all... this isn't even her final form!

Be warned, there's a lot of intro text for building epicness and stuff, if that isn't your kind of thing and you just want smut you can probably skip the majority of it.

Unlimited tokens may be needed to avoid cutoffs.

CW: Violence

I wanted to push the limits of what is possible for creating a boss fight, hope everyone enjoys it!

Alt Images
creator: Banjomarx
